title: microtea tenuissima
intro: Microtea tenuissima, also known as the slender microtea or golden thread, is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, where it is found in wetlands and along rivers. Microtea tenuissima has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to help alleviate symptoms of fever, pain, and infection. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system.
